hero.name: Dev
hero.mainHeading: Building reliable systems and shipping production-grade infrastructure.
hero.subline: Focused on correctness, security, and real-world impact through open source and protocol-level engineering.

profile.shortBio: I work at the intersection of systems, security, and infrastructure, building software that works under real-world constraints.
profile.longBio: I work at the intersection of systems, security, and infrastructure. My focus is on building reliable software that works under real-world constraints — not just in theory. From debugging runtime issues in Linux environments to implementing blockchain protocol features, I prioritize correctness, stability, and production impact. I actively contribute to open source systems like Sugar Labs, OpenSSF, and Hyperledger, working on areas such as runtime safety, secure software distribution, and protocol-level improvements.

projects.title: BTC HashFrame
projects.description: Security-first Bitcoin QR encoding platform built with client-side cryptographic guarantees.
highlights: Implemented full client-side QR generation without server transmission
Added validation layer for BIP21, PSBT, descriptors
Built structured encoding engine with strict TypeScript typing
Added error correction and QR sizing control
Designed secure UI workflow to prevent accidental exposure

projects.title: SHINRA Labs
projects.description: AI Data Labeling Infrastructure Platform with task lifecycle management and marketplace model.
highlights: Modular frontend architecture using React + Vite
End-to-end task pipeline simulation for B2B AI use cases

openSource.summary: I'm deeply involved in the open source infrastructure ecosystem, focusing on everything from Linux kernel fixes to security automation and blockchain protocol hardening. These contributions represent merged code in production systems.

organizations.name: SugarLabs
organizations.role: Core contributor to Sugar Learning Environment.
contributions: Fixed datastore restart handling after DBus disconnect
Improved clipboard handling when multiple items exist
Journal UX fixes including range selection & search focus preservation
Control panel write optimization to reduce excessive disk writes
Modal handling improvements in ActivityChooser
organizations.impact: Improved system stability, input reliability, and UI behavior across core desktop components.

organizations.name: OpenSSF (RSTUF)
organizations.tagline: Production security hardening across distributed services (non-root container enforcement)
contributions: Enforced non-root container execution across distributed microservices
Strengthened runtime security posture for package distribution pipelines
Improved API validation layers and service isolation
organizations.impact: Hardened software supply chain security for microservices and distribution pipelines.

organizations.name: Web3j (LFDT)
organizations.tagline: Blockchain protocol fixes and JVM-level reliability improvements
contributions: Fixed EIP-4844 transaction encoding impacting signing correctness
Resolved ClassLoader memory leak in async execution layer
Improved type safety in RPC response handling
organizations.impact: Improved protocol reliability and system performance for Ethereum-based JVM applications.

organizations.name: Hyperledger Cacti
organizations.tagline: Enterprise blockchain infra, dependency security, and protocol feature development
contributions: Fixed docker test crash loops affecting CI stability
Updated vulnerable dependencies and hardened infra setup
Contributed protocol-level feature (ERC6909 token support)
organizations.impact: Stabilized enterprise blockchain infrastructure and expanded protocol support.

organizations.name: SONiC
organizations.tagline: Network infrastructure testing (IPv6 environments and VOQ systems)
contributions: Enabled IPv6-only environment testing for COPP
Extended VOQ test coverage for single-ASIC systems
organizations.impact: Enhanced networking infrastructure test coverage for cloud environments.

organizations.name: Chicago Pediatric Cancer Data Commons
organizations.tagline: Healthcare ML pipeline fixes and dynamic clinical trial matching system
contributions: Fixed execution issues in ML pipeline notebooks
Built dynamic clinical trial matching dashboard
organizations.impact: Streamlined healthcare ML workflows and improved clinical trial patient matching.

organizations.name: BeagleBoard
contributions: Kernel-level and embedded system related improvements
Documentation and integration work across BeagleBoard ecosystem
organizations.impact: Low-level systems exposure, Linux-based hardware workflows, and embedded runtime understanding.

organizations.name: CHAOSS
contributions: Bugzilla REST pagination failure handling
Contributor repository map improvements
Sustainability documentation clarity fixes
organizations.impact: Improved robustness of open source health analytics tooling used across community metrics research.

organizations.name: OWASP
contributions: GitHub Actions workflow to prevent duplicate quality labels
Automation enforcement in issue management
organizations.impact: Improved contributor workflow hygiene and CI-based quality enforcement.

seo.title: Dev10-sys - Software Developer
seo.description: Software Developer with a focus on systems, security, and open source infrastructure.
